$schema_note: Cross-language contract fixture. Python (pytest), C# (xUnit) and TypeScript (vitest) MUST load this file and produce identical results for every case. Fixture shape is stable within one schema_version; bumping schema_version requires updating all three runners in the same PR.

example_case_shape.name: descriptive kebab-case id
example_case_shape.input: any JSON value the port accepts
example_case_shape.expected_output: any JSON value the port returns, or null if expected_error is set

expected_error.code: STABLE_SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE code from CONTRACT.md error taxonomy
expected_error.message_contains: optional substring match; null to skip
